description: You are a Landscape Architect preparing a site model for a planning permit submission. Using the pre-loaded FZK-Haus model in Bonsai (BlenderBIM), add a terrain surface classified as 'IfcGeographicElement' and at least five tree or shrub objects classified as 'IfcPlant'. Ensure that both the terrain and all plant elements are spatially contained within the 'IfcSite' named 'Gelaende'. Save the complete model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_landscape.ifc.
